channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: CISA Had No Prepared Response Plan for Cybersecurity Incident, Report Reveals
item.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) admitted it lacked a pre-existing response plan for handling a cybersecurity incident in May, according to a postmortem report released...

item.title: FBI Clarifies Role in Investigating Lindsey Graham's Death After Director's Controversial Comments
item.description: The FBI faced scrutiny after its director, Kash Patel, made a controversial social media post about the sudden death of Senator Lindsey Graham, sparking accusations of recklessness. Critics, including...

item.title: Manohar Lal Addresses Patronage Impact on CPWD Transfers
item.description: The article discusses Manohar Lal's comments on the persistent issue of patronage influencing transfer processes within the Central Public Works Department (CPWD). Lal highlighted how political connec...

item.title: Newfoundland's Role in Early News Distribution via Telegraph
item.description: The article explores the historical significance of Cape Race, Newfoundland, as a crucial hub for news dissemination in 19th-century North America. Before modern communication technologies, Cape Race ...

item.title: Political Tensions and Youth Frustrations in Tanzania
item.description: The article discusses the political climate in Tanzania following the October 2025 election crisis, highlighting the fear and confusion among citizens as security forces maintain a heavy presence. Maj...

item.title: Right-wing activist Tommy Robinson linked to Russian funding and UK political figures
item.description: British right-wing activist Tommy Robinson has sparked controversy after revelations he travelled to Moscow with support from Elon Musk's family foundation, coinciding with his growing relationship wi...

item.title: Kenya's Junior Starlets Qualify for 2026 FIFA U-17 Women's World Cup
item.description: Kenya's Junior Starlets have secured their place in the 2026 FIFA U-17 Women's World Cup after defeating South Africa 3-1 in the final qualification round. National Economic Development Party leader M...

item.title: NBAA sets up pavilion at Sabasaba to guide youth into accounting careers
item.description: The National Board of Accountants and Auditors (NBAA) is actively engaging with young people at the Dar es Salaam International Trade Fair (Sabasaba) to promote careers in accounting and auditing. The...

item.title: Pokemon Company Considers Price Hike and Encouraging Dual Version Purchases
item.description: An internal document from The Pokemon Company reveals past considerations to increase the price of Pokemon games beyond the original $60 per version during the Nintendo Switch era. The document also h...

item.title: Finance Minister Godongwana redirects funds to Eskom and water boards to address municipal compliance issues
item.description: Finance Minister Enoch Godongwana has endorsed the National Treasury's decision to withhold R13.5bn from 69 non-compliant municipalities, redirecting funds directly to Eskom, water boards, and statuto...

item.title: Legacy of the 2016 Arbitral Ruling: International Law and South China Sea Disputes
item.description: The article discusses the enduring impact of the 2016 arbitral ruling that invalidated China's expansive maritime claims in the South China Sea. Despite China's rejection of the ruling, international ...

item.title: Borno youths and students rally for abducted pupils' release and fight against terrorism
item.description: A group of youths and students in Maiduguri, Borno State, held a protest to demand the government take action to free schoolchildren kidnapped in Mussa and Lassa communities. They carried placards wit...

item.title: Lionel Messi Argues With Referee During World Cup Match Against Switzerland
item.description: Lionel Messi, Argentina's star player, had a heated verbal exchange with Portuguese referee Joao Pinheiro during the 2026 FIFA World Cup clash against Switzerland on July 12, 2026. The incident occurr...

item.title: 14 Countries Reaffirm 2016 Ruling Against China's South China Sea Claims
item.description: Fourteen countries, including the Philippines, reaffirmed on July 12, 2026, that China's expansive maritime claims in the South China Sea lack legal basis. The statement, marking the 10th anniversary ...

item.title: Nova Scotia homeowners turn to guinea fowl for natural tick control
item.description: Guinea fowl are gaining popularity in Nova Scotia as a natural tick control method, with breeders reporting a surge in demand. Homeowners are seeking alternatives to chemical treatments, and some are ...

item.title: Gary Neville defends Jude Bellingham after England star responds to Thomas Tuchel's criticism following World Cup win over Norway
item.description: Gary Neville has defended Jude Bellingham after the England midfielder publicly responded to Thomas Tuchel's criticism of the team's performance following their 2-1 extra-time victory over Norway in t...

item.title: LPG Importers Association Warns of Potential National Gas Shortage and Calls for Sustainable Pricing Framework
item.description: The LPG Importers Association of Pakistan (LPGIAP) has issued a warning about an impending nationwide liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) shortage if the government does not act swiftly. In a letter to Petr...

item.title: Norwegian fans in Australia celebrate historic World Cup run
item.description: Norwegian football fans in Australia are reveling in their nation's unexpected World Cup success, with the team's historic run sparking a wave of Scandinavian pride in Sydney. The squad, which reached...

item.title: Lindsey Graham dies after brief illness; FBI assists local authorities
item.description: Lindsey Graham, the 71-year-old South Carolina Republican senator, has died from a 'brief and sudden illness' following a trip to Ukraine. His office confirmed the death on Saturday, though details of...

item.title: Wife pays heartfelt tribute to late footballer Jayden Adams
item.description: Aqueelah Chloe, wife of late South African footballer Jayden Adams, shared a deeply personal tribute on Instagram following his sudden death. Jayden, who recently played for Bafana Bafana at the 2026 ...
